name: GT INT two-step invoice special request
requirement: For approved customer-specific exceptions, issue the INT portion of one shipment as two separate Business Central invoices instead of one combined INT invoice.

trigger_policy.reason: The requirement is still being defined and must not be automated until the business rule is approved.

split_strategy.basis: ClickUp billable charge names resolved by the standard GT invoice mapping preview

safety_controls: Requires an explicit old invoice number when replacing an existing invoice.
Cancels the old BC/FEL invoice before creating the split replacements.
Blocks if an active replacement invoice exists with a total that does not match the expected split total.
Reuses already-created active replacement invoices when rerun after a partial failure.
Requires manual issue datetime override if FEL rejects cancellation because the SAT registered issue datetime differs from BC.
Does not add or expose a webhook/API endpoint for this flow.

known_validation_case.notes: The original request came through DISPUTE-441, but the shipment source of truth is MTMLXGT-21971.
